title: Google Antigravity CLI Full Walkthrough
summary: Google Antigravity is an agent-first software development platform that helps developers build, orchestrate, and monitor AI agents. It connects AI agents directly to code editors, terminals, and browsers to perform development tasks autonomously. This content is a full walkthrough of the platform's CLI.
